data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no as membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date , 'MONTH YYYY') as month_thai , pka_kep_magent.fp_get_agent_amount_seq( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ) - sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.kep_method_amount as unkeep , '!paid_date_1!' as paid_date ,'!text1_1!' as text1 , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code) as district_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ) as province_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.postcode , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type_name , sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping , sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_name as fin_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.amount_form_file , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.address as address_coop , sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code , sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code) as district_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code ) as province_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control , sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type , sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr WHERE 1 = 2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = 'T020' --and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2022 --and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 2 --and sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = '007000' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no
